parameters.query:
INSERT INTO mailboxes (email, label, provider, is_active)
VALUES ('{{ $json.mailbox_email }}', '{{ $json.mailbox_label }}', 'gmail', true)
ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE
  SET label = EXCLUDED.label,
      is_active = true
RETURNING id, email;

-- Only insert contact for manual review if client not found
INSERT INTO contacts (email, full_name, company_name, contact_type)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.raw_payload.From.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] }}'        AS email,
  '{{ $json.raw_payload.From }}'                              AS full_name,
  '{{ ($json.raw_payload.From.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] || $json.raw_payload.From).split('@')[1] || '' }}'       AS company_name,
  'external'                      AS contact_type
WHERE '{{ $json.needs_manual_review }}' = 'true'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts WHERE email = '{{ $json.raw_payload.From.match(/<([^>]+)>/)?.[1] }}'
  )
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO email_threads (
  mailbox_id,
  provider_thread_id,
  client_id,
  subject,
  first_message_at,
  last_message_at,
  message_count,
  last_direction,
  status
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.mailbox_id }}',
  '{{ $json.provider_thread_id }}',
  {{ $json.client_id !== null ? "'" + $json.client_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.raw_payload.Subject.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.sent_at }}',
  '{{ $json.sent_at }}',
  1,
  '{{ $json.direction }}',
  'open'
)
ON CONFLICT (mailbox_id, provider_thread_id) DO UPDATE
  SET last_message_at = GREATEST(email_threads.last_message_at, EXCLUDED.last_message_at),
      message_count   = email_threads.message_count + 1,
      last_direction  = EXCLUDED.last_direction,
      status          = CASE
        WHEN email_threads.status = 'closed' THEN 'open'
        ELSE email_threads.status
      END,
      client_id       = COALESCE(email_threads.client_id, EXCLUDED.client_id)
RETURNING id AS thread_id;

INSERT INTO email_messages (
  mailbox_id,
  thread_id,
  client_id,
  provider_message_id,
  internet_message_id,
  subject,
  snippet,
  body_text,
  sent_at,
  direction,
  raw_payload
) VALUES (
  '{{ ($json.mailbox_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.thread_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.client_id ? "'" + $json.client_id.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.provider_message_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.internet_message_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.snippet || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body_text || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.sent_at || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.direction || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_payload || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
)
ON CONFLICT (mailbox_id, provider_message_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  thread_id           = EXCLUDED.thread_id,
  client_id           = COALESCE(email_messages.client_id, EXCLUDED.client_id),
  internet_message_id = EXCLUDED.internet_message_id,
  subject             = EXCLUDED.subject,
  snippet             = EXCLUDED.snippet,
  body_text           = EXCLUDED.body_text,
  direction           = EXCLUDED.direction,
  raw_payload         = EXCLUDED.raw_payload
RETURNING id AS message_id;

INSERT INTO email_message_participants (message_id, email, full_name, participant_role)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email }}',
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  '{{ $json.role }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (message_id, participant_role, email) DO NOTHING;

UPDATE email_threads SET
  message_count    = (SELECT count(*) FROM email_messages WHERE thread_id = '{{ $('Expand participants').first().json.thread_id }}'),
  first_message_at = (SELECT min(sent_at) FROM email_messages WHERE thread_id = '{{ $('Expand participants').first().json.thread_id }}'),
  last_message_at  = (SELECT max(sent_at) FROM email_messages WHERE thread_id = '{{ $('Expand participants').first().json.thread_id }}'),
  last_direction   = (
    SELECT direction FROM email_messages
    WHERE thread_id = '{{ $('Expand participants').first().json.thread_id }}'
    ORDER BY sent_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  )
WHERE id = '{{ $('Expand participants').first().json.thread_id }}';

INSERT INTO sync_cursors (integration_key, cursor_value)
VALUES (
  'gmail_history::' || '{{ $json.mailbox_email }}',
  '{{ $json.highest_history_id }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (integration_key) DO UPDATE
  SET cursor_value = EXCLUDED.cursor_value,
      updated_at   = now();
